profiles.name: 01 Score Navigator
profiles.description: Designed for musicians reading digital sheet music on a tablet or notebook (e.g., forScore, MobileSheets, or Adobe Acrobat). Uses standard navigation keys to turn pages and jump to sections.

profiles.name: 02 Pixel Camera Remote
profiles.description: Hands-free video and photo control for Google Pixel smartphones. Uses the Volume Up shortcut to trigger the shutter. Includes a 3-second delay on Button A to allow the performer to get into position.

profiles.name: 03 VLC Mobile Controller
profiles.description: Optimized for the VLC app on smartphones. Ideal for musicians practicing along with video/audio recordings. Allows for quick pausing and speed adjustments to learn difficult passages.

profiles.name: 04 OBS Stream Deck
profiles.description: A foot-operated switcher for OBS Studio on a PC/Mac. Uses high-range function keys (F13-F16) to switch scenes or mute audio without interfering with standard keyboard typing.

profiles.name: 05 DAW Looper (Ableton)
profiles.description: General purpose recording and looping profile for DAWs like Ableton Live. Focuses on the 'Solo Performer' workflow where undoing a bad take quickly is essential.

profiles.name: 06 Social and Comms
profiles.description: A productivity profile for interacting with Discord, Slack, or Zoom while playing an instrument. Includes a one-touch status update for rehearsals.

A.name: Quick Msg
A.value: Starting now, see you in the chat!

profiles.name: 07 System Debug
profiles.description: Technical health check profile for the AwesomeStudioPedal. Sends status messages to the Serial Monitor and provides basic OS navigation (Up/Down) for emergency menu control.

A.name: Ping Pedal
A.value: AwesomeStudioPedal: Profile 7 Active - All systems nominal.
